source_pr.title: pkg/domain/crossks: fix flaky TestManager coordinator session count check
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #66831

Problem Summary:
`TestManager/check_cross_keyspace_session_are_recorded_in_coordinator_and_contains_related_tables` in `pkg/domain/crossks/cross_ks_test.go` is flaky in CI. The subtest asserted an exact `coordinator.InternalSessionCount() == 1` while cross-keyspace background workers can borrow internal sessions concurrently from the same pool, causing transient count `2`.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Relaxed the in-transaction assertion from exact count to an invariant check:
  - from `require.EqualValues(t, 1, coordinator.InternalSessionCount())`
  - to `require.GreaterOrEqual(t, coordinator.InternalSessionCount(), 1)`
- Kept the stronger ownership assertion `require.True(t, coordinator.ContainsInternalSession(se))`.
- Replaced immediate post-transaction zero-count assertion with condition-based waiting:
  - `require.Eventually(... coordinator.InternalSessionCount() == 0, 10*time.Second, 20*time.Millisecond)`

This keeps the intended behavior checks while removing timing sensitivity from concurrent background session usage.

- [ ] No need to test

  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

Documentation

- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note

```

root_cause_explanation: The cross-keyspace manager test was flaky because it asserted an exact internal-session count (`== 1`) while background workers can borrow internal sessions concurrently, transiently increasing the count (e.g., to 2). The PR relaxes the assertion to stable invariants and uses `Eventually` for post-transaction cleanup expectations.
